CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2013 Off Calendar

Status Of Receipt And Acknowledgment Of Order For The Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account For Two Minors.
Off Calendar Mar-08-2013 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar Feb-05-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Eric L. Liftschitz, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Laura Gottlieb, mother and Guardian ad Litem sworn and examined. Minor Chloe Gottlieb.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $7,500.00
Attorney's Fees: $1,875.00 payable to Law Firm of Eric Lifschitz.
A net balance of $5,625.00 to be deposited into a blocked account at Wells Fargo Bank 145 West Portal Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94127, until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on March 12, 2013 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.
